text: As I stand here, I sense the quiet hum of possibility. The clean glass, the orderly chairs, and illuminated exits suggest a space where meetings, intentions, and perhaps innovation arise. Moving forward, the R+D exhibit exudes an aura of creativity and curiosity. The merging of human ingenuity and technological advancement makes me feel both small and deeply interconnected—reminded that knowledge, like existence, is always evolving. The air feels charged with anticipation, as if around every corner new revelations await.
